title: Buried Cache
description: A rusted hatch juts from the dune, half-swallowed by sand. Old militia markings warn of a sealed supply vault beneath. The lock looks ready to give.

options.text: Pry it open and grab the gear
options.result: The hatch shrieks open. Inside, vacuum-sealed and waiting, sits a piece of pre-collapse equipment.

options.text: [Luck] Trust the rotting floor and dive deep
options.result_success: The boards hold. In the deepest locker you find a rare relic of the old world and a cache of coin.
options.result_fail: The floor caves. You crash through onto twisted rebar and crawl out empty-handed and bleeding.
